cityDNA.coreFantasy: A pristine high-elven astronomical mountain civilization where scholarship, observatory geometry, law, temple processions, alchemy, and curated gardens become marble and blue light.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Luminthalas is not nature-first elven fantasy; the uploaded images show perfected civic knowledge made habitable through marble, terraces, blue crystal, and formal institutions.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Luminthalas makes beauty the evidence of institutional order.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Moonstone, granite, cedar, gold leaf, pale marble, observatory domes, lecture courts, star-map ceilings, assembly halls, temple platforms, alchemy labs, blue lamps, prism bridges, and formal terraces.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: High-elven scholars, lawmakers, astronomers, temple attendants, alchemists, and gardeners who treat elegance as discipline.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Stars, moonlight, armillary spheres, observatory domes, blue lamps, prisms, formal gardens, charters, processions, and formula archives symbolize wisdom disciplined into place.

canonLocks: Wonder: High-Elven Prism Arboretum of Dawn Bridges.
Seat of Power: Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court.
Districts: University / Lyceum, Observatory / Astronomy, Legislative Quarter, Religious / Temple Quarter, Arcane / Alchemical Labs.

Exact uploaded anchors include University / Lyceum Civic Hall, Lecture Hall Beacon, Star Navigation Monument, Observatory Court Nook, Observatory / Astronomy Civic Hall, Star Observatory, Celestial Court Nook, Legislative Quarter Hall, Assembly Hall, Legislative Quarter Gold-Seal Monument, Charter Arcade Nook, Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall, Temple Platform, Religious Temple Quarter Lantern Monument, Procession Stair Nook, Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab, Blue-Lamp Monument, and Formula Archive Nook.
provisionalCanon: The city's highest virtue is wisdom.
The image pass confirms polished, formal, institution-heavy elven civic order rather than wild canopy logic.
rejectedReads: wild gardens replacing designed civic architecture
cautionFlags: Keep curated gardens and formal sightlines.
Show public knowledge through lectures, observatories, law, temple rites, and laboratories.

environment.environmentalLogic: The uploaded images show landscape disciplined into bridges, terraces, sightlines, gardens, courts, and institution routes.

forms: High-Elven Prism Arboretum of Dawn Bridges
Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court
skyline: Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court as authority
Lecture Hall Beacon as educational signal
observatory towers, assembly halls, temple platforms, and alchemy labs along white terraces

civilization.people: Citizens are refined but not idle: scholars, students, astronomers, clerks, temple attendants, alchemists, and gardeners participate in calm institutional life.
civilization.governance: The Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court blends legal deliberation, celestial symbolism, and scholarly testimony.
civilization.religion: Celestial ritual appears through temple platforms, lantern monuments, procession stairs, star geometry, and light rites.

streets.appearance: Clean, pale, elevated, and deliberately placed with polished paving, blue lamps, terraces, bridges, plazas, formal gardens, observatory towers, lecture courts, temple platforms, and alchemical glass.
streets.movement: Movement is terraced and choreographed through bridges, stairs, promenades, lecture routes, assembly courts, and observatory approaches.
streets.lighting: White marble and moonstone reflect day cleanly; night is blue-white, moonlit, and prism-lit.
streets.weatherEffects: Mist and rain turn polished stone and blue crystal into halos.
streets.dayCycle: Lectures, assemblies, gardens, and labs dominate the day.
streets.nightCycle: Observatory work, moonlit gardens, temple lights, and blue reflections dominate night.

housing.wealthy: Pale stone residences near observatory, court, or formal gardens.
housing.middle: Scholar apartments, artisan rooms, and student housing with blue-glass windows.
housing.poor: Modest but orderly service housing near gardens, labs, or markets.

districts.name: University / Lyceum
districts.civicPurpose: Public scholarship, civic instruction, and Beacon interpretation.
districts.visualIdentity: University / Lyceum Civic Hall, Lecture Hall Beacon, Star Navigation Monument, Observatory Court Nook.

districts.name: Observatory / Astronomy
districts.civicPurpose: Celestial study, public sky-reading, and long-cycle observation.
districts.visualIdentity: Observatory / Astronomy Civic Hall, Star Observatory, Star Navigation Monument, Celestial Court Nook.

districts.name: Legislative Quarter
districts.civicPurpose: Deliberation, civic law, petitions, and institutional governance.
districts.visualIdentity: Legislative Quarter Hall, Assembly Hall, Legislative Quarter Gold-Seal Monument, Charter Arcade Nook.

districts.name: Religious / Temple Quarter
districts.civicPurpose: Ritual processions, celestial spirituality, and public order.
districts.visualIdentity: Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall, Temple Platform, Religious Temple Quarter Lantern Monument, Procession Stair Nook.

districts.name: Arcane / Alchemical Labs
districts.civicPurpose: Controlled experimentation, formula archives, and practical magical research.
districts.visualIdentity: Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab, Blue-Lamp Monument, Formula Archive Nook.

wonder.name: High-Elven Prism Arboretum of Dawn Bridges
wonder.symbolicRole: Formal garden, prism light, bridge architecture, and high-elven refinement fused into civic ideal.
wonder.visualRole: Skyline-scale arboretum and bridge complex of pale stone, blue glass, formal greenery, and refracted light.
wonder.civicRole: Formal walks, scholarly gatherings, garden ceremonies, and dawn observations.
storyHooks: A bridge alignment reveals which institution moved a truth out of sight.

beacon.name: Lecture Hall Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Public knowledge and public anxiety meeting in one educational signal.
beacon.visualRole: Blue-white signal landmark associated with university architecture and public notices.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates instruction, signal watching, student gathering, and announcements.
storyHooks: A Beacon state becomes a lesson everyone must read.

seatOfPower.name: Star Map Ceilings Veiled High Court
seatOfPower.visualRole: High court with star-map ceilings, pale stone, blue glass, and ceremonial stairs.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Deliberation, formal petitions, scholarly testimony, and rulings.
storyHooks: A court ceiling encodes an old legal precedent.

majorLandmarks.name: Star Observatory
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Observatory dome with armillary instruments and star charts.
storyHooks: A star chart makes the perfect calendar look edited.

majorLandmarks.name: Assembly Hall
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Formal hall with gold seal and charter arcade.
storyHooks: A charter inscription proves an elegant law has an ugly exception.

majorLandmarks.name: Temple Platform
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Platform with lantern monument and procession stairs.
storyHooks: A procession pauses at the stair where a ruling was hidden.

majorLandmarks.name: Alchemy Lab
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Clean laboratory with blue lamp and formula archive.
storyHooks: A formula archive reveals what elegance refuses to say.
